text:
Once upon a time in the quiet village of Everdell, there lived a curious squirrel named Sandy. Sandy loved to explore and was always bursting with questions. Early one summer morning, while her parents were away gathering nuts, Sandy scoured the village’s oldest tree for stories.

In the heart of an ancient oak stood an ancient book, its cover weathered and embossed like the bark of its owner. Sandy climbed up and peered inside. The pages told tales of long ago explorers who sailed westward on ships named Seaflower. They discovered lands filled with wonders that changed the world forever.

As Sandy flipped through ancient text, she learned about brave sailors charting courses over vast oceans. They brought back marvels like shiny sea jewels and strange creatures untouched by human hands. Some say they even found paradise.

Driven by dreams of adventure, Sandy crafted a tiny treasure chest—just big enough to carry her dreams. She whispered goodbyes to her kin and set off on a voyage she
